commit.message:
network: replace adguard-home with pihole + nebula-sync

- DaemonSet deployment (one pod per node: control10/11/12)
- MetalLB VIP 10.0.69.99 retained for LAN DNS
- ClusterIP with sessionAffinity:ClientIP for admin web UI session stickiness
- NodePort 30080 with externalTrafficPolicy:Local for per-node nebula-sync access
- nebula-sync CronJob (hourly) syncs from control10 (primary) to control11+12
- hostPath /var/lib/pihole for gravity DB + settings persistence per node
- Custom dnsmasq config for .lan forward DNS + reverse DNS via 10.0.69.1
- CoreDNS updated to forward to pihole-dns-cluster service
- PIHOLE_WEBPASSWORD replaces ADGUARD_ADMIN_PASSWORD_BCRYPT in cluster-secrets
- Renovate will track pihole/pihole and nebula-sync image updates

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix Cloudflare timeout with fire-and-poll pattern

All POST endpoints now return immediately with a task_id. The handler
runs in a background thread and stores its result in a server-side
_tasks dict. The frontend polls GET /api/task/{id} every 3s until the
task completes.

Also fixes api() JS function to check resp.ok before parsing JSON,
preventing the 'Unexpected token <' error on HTML error pages.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- BankTransaction 新增 ActivityId、PendingRemittanceId FK

後端服務與控制器：

整合測試：

commit.message:
Fix async/await regression: route async.* host functions through call_host_fn

The call/apply/bind validation commit changed vm_call_function_value's
VmObject branch from call_host_fn to call_named_host_function_with_this.
However, call_named_host_function_with_this only recognizes specific
prefixes (promise., array., etc.) and falls through to
call_named_host_function for unrecognized names. The 'async.resume.fulfill'
and 'async.resume.reject' callbacks (used for await suspension/resumption)
start with 'async.' which was not in the prefix list, so they silently
dropped — causing await to never resume.

Add 'async.' to the prefix routing in call_named_host_function_with_this.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: add smp and tsm to UADE_EXTENSIONS for format recognition

smp (ThomasHermann companion prefix) and tsm (SunTronic/TSM suffix variant)
were in SCAN_CRASH_PREFIXES/SHORT_SCAN_PREFIXES but missing from the main
UADE_EXTENSIONS set. This caused isSupportedFormat() to reject these files
before they could reach the UADE parser.

Add --tone flag for subtitle filtering and jacket tone override

generate command: --tone pop|mainstream|niche filters generated
subtitles by accessibility score (rejection sampling, max 200 tries).
Pop subtitles use high-frequency fillers (Race, Power, America);
niche ones use low-frequency/academic fillers.

jacket command: --tone overrides the auto-detected tier, letting
you force a niche subtitle into airport-bookstore style or vice versa.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add accessibility-based tone tiers to jacket prompts

Compute an accessibility score from filler corpus frequencies:
- pop (score > 1.0): airport bookstore tone (Gladwell, Pollan, Bryson)
- mainstream (0.5-1.0): indie bookstore tone (Solnit, Mishra, Sheldrake)
- niche (< 0.5): university press crossover tone (Princeton/Yale lists)

Score = mean(log10(1 + freq)) across parsed slot fillers. Custom
subtitles get fuzzy lookup against the filler DB; unparseable strings
default to mainstream.

Tone text injected into both one-shot and deep-research prompts.
Displayed in CLI output as 'Tone tier: pop/mainstream/niche (score)'.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Separerer rapporterte opplysninger for ytelse og for atfl-inntekt (#1267)

### **Behov / Bakgrunn**

Ytelse og ATFL-inntekt må holdes separat for å kunne redusere utbetaling
med ulik grad.

### **Løsning**

- `Inntektsresultat` bærer nå `Set<RapportertInntekt>` (med
`InntektType`) fremfor én samlet sum
- `mapAutomatiskKontrollerteInntektperioder` summerer
`ARBEIDSTAKER_ELLER_FRILANSER` og `YTELSE` separat og mapper til
`medInntekt(...)`/`medYtelse(...)` på `KontrollertInntektPeriode`

### **Andre endringer**

- Fjernet ubrukt `RapportertInntektOgKilde`-record (død kode)
- Fjernet ubrukte `BigDecimal`- og `List`-importer fra
`Inntektsresultat`
- Lagt til `KontrollerteInntektperioderTjenesteTest` med fire tester som
dekker: kombinasjon av begge typer, bare ATFL, bare ytelse og tom mengde

commit.message:
feat: X11 backend for l_gfx.h — windowed graphics on Linux desktops

Adds direct X11 wire protocol support to l_gfx.h, enabling graphical
demos and UI apps to run inside X11/Wayland desktop sessions (via
XWayland) without any library dependencies.

Changes:
- l_os.h: Add L_AF_UNIX constant, l_socket_unix_connect() for Unix
  domain sockets, L_AF_UNIX support in l_socket_open()
- l_gfx.h: X11 backend with auto-detection ( → X11, else fbdev)
  - X11 setup handshake with MIT-MAGIC-COOKIE-1 auth
  - CreateWindow, CreateGC, MapWindow, ChangeProperty (title)
  - PutImage with row-band chunking (handles max request size)
  - Event handling: KeyPress, ButtonPress/Release, MotionNotify
  - Minimal keycode→ASCII mapping for US keyboard layout
- l_gfx.h: Enable L_WITHSOCKETS automatically on Linux
- All graphical examples: call l_getenv_init() for  detection

CI: 10/10 configurations pass (Win, Lin gcc/clang, ARM/AArch64 gcc/clang)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address PR review comments

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/GregorGullwi/FlashCpp/sessions/ae7a938c-08fa-4d90-8237-7d147b5fde6d

Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix comment indentation to match code level (2 tabs, not 3)

* Fix ternary branch assignment RHS to preserve pointer_depth and other TypedValue metadata

In the non-LValueAddress path, the branch assignment RHS was using
makeTypedValue() which only sets type_index, size_in_bits, and value,
losing pointer_depth, ir_type, and ref_qualifier. This could cause
downstream IR lowering to misinterpret pointer values (e.g.,
`cond ? ptr1 : ptr2` would have pointer_depth=0 instead of 1).

Restore the original toTypedValue() behavior for the RHS in the normal
(non-address) path, while keeping the LValueAddress path unchanged.
Split the single makeMergedBranchValue lambda into separate makeBranchLhs
and makeBranchRhs helpers for clarity.

* Remove fixed known issue: ternary member access in address-of context

This issue was fixed in this PR by propagating ExpressionContext into
generateTernaryOperatorIr and materializing addresses in each branch.
The entry was accidentally re-added during a rebase.

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: devin-ai-integration[bot] <158243242+devin-ai-integration[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: use provider_uri directly in qlib.init() instead of ignored provider_config

The QlibFactorCalculator._init_qlib() was passing provider_config={...}
to qlib.init(), but qlib does not recognize this parameter and silently
falls back to the default data path (~/.qlib/qlib_data/cn_data).

This caused all correlation and factor APIs to read from the wrong
directory, returning empty results even when qlib_data/ had valid data.

Fix: pass provider_uri directly to qlib.init().

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix ghosted rate knobs + robust mute forwarding for WASM engines

SpaceyDelayer/RETapeEcho editors: Remove opacity-40/pointer-events-none
wrapper on rate knobs when BPM sync is active. Now turning the knob
auto-disables BPM sync (matching SpaceEcho pattern). Shows 'SYNC' label
when synced.

Mute/Solo forwarding: Convert require() calls to cached dynamic import()
for Vite ESM compatibility. UADE, Furnace, and gain engine imports now
use eager warm-up (fired at module load) so the first mute/solo click
works instantly. Matches the existing SunVox lazy import pattern.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Frost

commit.message:
Phase 2: Virtual scroll, manual parser, and feature enhancements

Performance:
- Replace viewport with virtual scroll (only render visible ~40 lines)
- Replace regex parser with hand-written scanner (~5-10x faster)
- Pre-render and cache styled entry lines (RenderedBase)
- Ring buffer overflow pruning for filtered list

Features:
- Search highlighting (yellow/bold on matching terms)
- Auto-reconnect on stream disconnect (3s countdown)
- Clear device logcat buffer (c key sends adb logcat -c)
- Logcat buffer selection (B key cycles main/system/crash/events/all)
- Crash/ANR detection with red highlighting
- Mouse wheel scroll support
- Copy current line to clipboard (y key)
- Scroll position indicator (line/total/percentage)
- Column-aligned log output (timestamp/pid/tid/level/tag/message)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Mark barebone plan as done

commit.message:
fix(time): parse date-only strings as UTC midnight to prevent day-1 offset

Date-only inputs (YYYY-MM-DD) were parsed as Asia/Shanghai midnight,
which when stored in @db.Date columns (UTC) would shift back one day.
Now parsed as UTC midnight, preserving the intended calendar date.

Affects: Semester.startDate/endDate, Exam.examDate, Schedule.date

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
